cards.title: Gutena Forms RCE
cards.summary: [P1] The Gutena Forms WordPress plugin is vulnerable to remote code execution, with no patch available. Exploitation is not yet reported in the wild. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: Ally Web Accessibility RCE
cards.summary: [P1] The Ally Web Accessibility & Usability plugin is vulnerable to remote code execution, with no patch available. Exploitation is not yet reported in the wild. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: MR-GM5L-S1 Code Injection
cards.summary: [P1] MR-GM5L-S1 and MR-GM5A-L1 devices are vulnerable to code injection, with no patch available. Exploitation is not yet reported in the wild. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: MR-GM5L-S1 Hard-Coded Credentials
cards.summary: [P1] MR-GM5L-S1 and MR-GM5A-L1 devices have hard-coded credentials, with no patch available. Exploitation is not yet reported in the wild. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: Netbox-Docker Default Credentials
